1.premise: Buying debt makes repayment the buyer's problem.

lines.text: - What's up, y'all?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Did y'all know that a company can buy your debt
lines.label: setup

lines.text: from somebody else?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Jefferson Capital emailed me,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And they said, "Hey, we bought your debt from Sprint.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You owe us money now."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: No, nigga, you bought it.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: That's yours now.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: If I leave a dog outside and you adopt the dog,
lines.label: tag

lines.text: it's not on me to feed the dog, right?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: That's not America.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: That's your debt now.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I know Sprint, nigga, I don't know you.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I know Sarah has sprits.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Sarah know why I couldn't pay
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and why I was putting something on it.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Jefferson Capital, nigga, I can't even Google y'all.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I'm never gonna, what the,
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: what kind of a stupid ass company
lines.label: setup

lines.text: buy debt from other people?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That's the same niggas that go online
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and they feed the homeless on HD cameras.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: What kind of shit?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: You think I'm finna, nigga, I see sprint commercials
lines.label: setup

lines.text: every day and I go, "Oh, them niggas don't ever see it."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I don't, how dare you come to me like Jesus.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Didn't even, when Jesus paid for our sins,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: that nigga never sent me an email being like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: the adultery that you made last year.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: That's my time, I'm dead to bed.
lines.label: fluff
